title: EXTRACT-RULES output — per-source atomic rules RULE* with verbatim evidence

sources_ref.description: path to sources.json listing the tool manifest files

stack.description: technology stack items extracted rules apply to

rules.description: per-source atomic rules; duplicates and contradictions kept intact for RECONCILE

id.description: stable rule id; RULE* contiguous from RULE1, never renumbered

source_ref.description: SRC* id from sources.json; exactly one per rule — the provenance link

tier.description: tier copied verbatim from sources.json; 1 = highest authority

tool.description: tool name copied verbatim from sources.json

tool_version_pinned.description: pinned version copied verbatim from sources.json; never invented or altered

kind.description: config for parsed machine-readable settings; opinion for prose prescriptions

topic.description: short subject slug enabling RECONCILE to group candidates; not unique

setting.description: verbatim key+value from config; null for kind:opinion

evidence.description: verbatim snippet from the manifest proving this rule exists; non-empty

unfetched_sources.description: every SRC* whose file is missing on disk; [] if all fetched

id.description: SRC* id that was not fetched

reason.description: why this source was not extracted; e.g. file absent on disk

extraction_meta.description: integer tallies; walk to count, do not estimate

sources_extracted.description: sources whose rules were extracted; sources_extracted + sources_unfetched == sources_total

sources_unfetched.description: sources skipped due to missing files

by_tier.description: rule count per tier; tier keys as strings; sums to rules_total

additionalProperties.description: count of rules at this tier
